'''nashapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:availing|availing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:availing|availing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nashapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næshæpæth|næshæpæth]] || [[word:næshæpæj|næshæpæj]] || [[word:næshæpæsh|næshæpæsh]] || [[word:næshæpæ|næshæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nashashapath|nashashapath]] || [[word:nashashapaj|nashashapaj]] || [[word:nashashapash|nashashapash]] || [[word:nashashapa|nashashapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nashapath|nashapath]] || [[word:nashapaj|nashapaj]] || [[word:nashapash|nashapash]] || [[word:nashapa|nashapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nashafpath|nashafpath]] || [[word:nashafpaj|nashafpaj]] || [[word:nashafpash|nashafpash]] || [[word:nashafpaf|nashafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nashapatha|nashapatha]] || [[word:nashapaja|nashapaja]] || [[word:nashapasha|nashapasha]] || [[word:nashapaka|nashapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nashapath|nashapath]] || [[word:nashapaj|nashapaj]] || [[word:nashapash|nashapash]] || [[word:nashapa|nashapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nashapathal|nashapathal]] || [[word:nashapajal|nashapajal]] || [[word:nashapashal|nashapashal]] || [[word:nashapakal|nashapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nashapathatha|nashapathatha]] || [[word:nashapajaja|nashapajaja]] || [[word:nashapashasha|nashapashasha]] || [[word:nashapaka|nashapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nashapathan|nashapathan]] || [[word:nashapajan|nashapajan]] || [[word:nashapashan|nashapashan]] || [[word:nashapakan|nashapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nashapathaoro|nashapathaoro]] || [[word:nashapajaoro|nashapajaoro]] || [[word:nashapashaoro|nashapashaoro]] || [[word:nashapakaoro|nashapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
